scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run evaluate
scripts.sprint:start: echo '' && echo '=== Discovery Sprint Startup ===' && echo '' && echo 'Sprint Update Documents:' && find 'docs/Sprint Updates' -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort && echo '' && echo 'Project Structure:' && find . \( -path './node_modules' -o -path './.next' -o -path './.git' \) -prune -o -maxdepth 3 -print | sort && echo '' && echo 'Recommended Startup Workflow:' && echo '  1. npm run validate' && echo '  2. Read docs/Sprint Updates' && echo '  3. Begin capability audit'
